query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of a backlit orange fruit with a fibrous, web-like network of dark membranes and stringy vascular tissue silhouetted against a glowing central light source. The intricate lattice of dried or decomposed organic matter forms delicate branching patterns across the frame, with the bright circular nucleus visible through translucent flesh.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, surreal close-up of decomposed organic matter resembling a fruit interior, where a glowing overexposed light source burns through sickly orange-hued translucent tissue. The fibrous web of dark membranes creates an unsettling biological lattice, evoking a dreamlike, almost nightmarish quality through its abstracted, unrecognizable form and the unnatural rot-like color cast permeating the entire frame.
